# propagated

**Instance Property**

A dictionary of attachments to copy when propagating attachments from one object to another.

## Declaration

```swift
var propagated: [String : Any] { get }
```

## Inspecting Attachments

- **nonPropagated**: A dictionary of attachments to not copy when propagating attachments from one object to another.
